mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reviews (movieid, userid, content, score, createdat) VALUES (#{movieId}, #{userId}, #{content}, #{score}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT r.reviewid, r.movieid, m.title, r.userid, u.username, r.content, r.score, r.createdat FROM reviews r JOIN movies m ON r.movieid = m.movieid JOIN users u ON r.userid = u.userid WHERE r.reviewid = #{reviewId}

SELECT r.reviewid, r.movieid, m.title, r.userid, u.username, r.content, r.score, r.createdat FROM reviews r JOIN movies m ON r.movieid = m.movieid JOIN users u ON r.userid = u.userid WHERE r.movieid = #{movieId} order by r.createdat desc
select * from reviews order by createdat desc

SELECT r.reviewid, r.movieid, m.title, r.userid, u.username, r.content, r.score, r.createdat FROM reviews r JOIN movies m ON r.movieid = m.movieid JOIN users u ON r.userid = u.userid WHERE r.userid = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE reviews SET movieid = #{movieId}, userid = #{userId}, content = #{content}, score = #{score}, createdat = #{createdAt} WHERE reviewid = #{reviewId}
